role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Devanagari script and associated languages (Hindi/Nepali).
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil color, and vegetation types consistent with the Indo-Gangetic plain.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on broadleaf deciduous trees and scrub, correctly identifying tropical/monsoon patterns.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Discussed road markings (white lines) and infrastructure standards (shoulders, brickwork).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues like Google Street View camera artifacts and rural construction styles.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified India. The agents provided grounded, image-specific evidence (Devanagari script, red brick, tropical deciduous trees) and the tournament logic correctly prioritized the strongest candidate.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Terrain and vegetation descriptions match the visual evidence.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Plant types described are consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road markings and building materials accurately described.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: General scene characteristics (rural, brick, blur) match.
